title: Happy Ghast: BombsAway
description: BombsAway, allows players to throw TNT from the back of a happy ghast with a simple right-click!
body:
![mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a668ababc7757e1f55f04822015467646e2435b6.jpeg)

**BombsAway** enhances your gameplay by adding an explosive twist with TNT mechanics. This mod allows players to throw TNT with a special twist. if mounted on a **Happy Ghast**, the player can drop TNT even while riding. However, Additionally, it introduces a Flint and Steel requirement for igniting TNT, making the game more immersive. This mechanic can be bypassed for Creative players.

[Check every version here](https://rickjeh.github.io/MCProject-Websites/bombsaway.html)

![modshowcasegif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c795adf2ca4e36e327a6460439fd5cb381e52e.gif)![modshowcasegif2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83e93561921205c57237420901bc77aaf1dfccdc.gif)


**Key Features:**
 
- TNT Dropping: Drop TNT while mounted on a Happy Ghast.
- Flint and Steel Requirement: Players need Flint and Steel to ignite TNT in Survival and Adventure modes (not required in Creative mode).
- Behavior: Place TNT anywhere unless mounted on a Happy Ghast.
- Compatibility: Works with Minecraft’s single-player mode (Fabric) and is designed to enhance player interactions with TNT in a balanced and fun way.

**Multiplayer:** A plugin version has been released for paper, you can download it [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/happy-ghast-bombsaway-plugin/versions)
